docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2023 - CASE IS TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH TO BE HEARD IN DEPT 611 BEFORE JUDGE KARNOW TO FEB-24-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 611. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT BOTH HAVE REPORTED TO DEPT 506 AND REDIRECTED TO DEPT. 611 AND GIVEN NOTICE TO BOTH PARTIES BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HUANG, SUIHUA AS TO DEFENDANT WHITAKER, SANFORD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2022 - CONTINUED TO FEB-24-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SUIHUA HUANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT SANFORD WHITAKER IS PRESENT. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JONATHAN POLLAND; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2023 - PLAINTIFF SUI HUA HUANG IS PRESENT. REBECCA CHAU, CANTONESE INTERPRETER ASSISTS PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT SANFORD WHITAKER IS PRESENT. PARTIES ARE SWORN. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS HIS CASE. DEFENDANT PRESENTS HIS CASE. AFTER TESTIMONY, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. (TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2023 BY CURTIS KARNOW). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE COURT WILL ISSUE AN ORDER IN A WEEK,. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (611/CK)
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-28-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-09-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, SUIHUA AS TO DEFENDANT WHITAKER, SANFORD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED SEP-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITAKER, SANFORD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHITAKER, SANFORD
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT WHITAKER, SANFORD
ORDER ORDER TO CONTINUE PLAINTIFF WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, SUIHUA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WHITAKER, SANFORD PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHOW DEFENDANT WAS AT FAULT. PLAINTIFF, NOT DEFENDANT, HAD A STOP SIGN, AND PLAINTIFF WAS NOT ABLE TO SHOW DEFENDANT'S SPEED WAS THE CAUSE OF THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
